action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed because best.pt not saved (ExpRate always 0). Training is slow (100s/epoch) with 256x1024 images. Loss decreasing but model can't produce correct sequences yet. Analysis: Need to fix checkpoint saving, reduce image size for speed, improve model. Decision: Fix saving, reduce to 128x512, train 15 epochs, add teacher forcing ratio decay.
